keyframes.name: features-distribution-apps-1
rules: 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(96px, 48px) rotate(-90deg) scale(0.5); filter: blur(10px); }
100% { opacity: 1; transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0px) scale(1); filter: blur(0px); }

keyframes.name: features-distribution-apps-2
rules: 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(48px) rotate(0deg) scale(0.5); filter: blur(10px); }
100% { opacity: 1; transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0px) scale(1); filter: blur(0px); }

keyframes.name: features-distribution-apps-3
rules: 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-96px, 48px) rotate(90deg) scale(0.5); filter: blur(10px); }
100% { opacity: 1; transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0px) scale(1); filter: blur(0px); }
